'''fakasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanolipid|cyanolipid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-k-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanolipid|cyanolipid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fakasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fækæsæth|fækæsæth]] || [[word:fækæsæj|fækæsæj]] || [[word:fækæsæsh|fækæsæsh]] || [[word:fækæsæ|fækæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fakakasath|fakakasath]] || [[word:fakakasaj|fakakasaj]] || [[word:fakakasash|fakakasash]] || [[word:fakakasa|fakakasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fakasath|fakasath]] || [[word:fakasaj|fakasaj]] || [[word:fakasash|fakasash]] || [[word:fakasa|fakasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fakafsath|fakafsath]] || [[word:fakafsaj|fakafsaj]] || [[word:fakafsash|fakafsash]] || [[word:fakafsaf|fakafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fakasatha|fakasatha]] || [[word:fakasaja|fakasaja]] || [[word:fakasasha|fakasasha]] || [[word:fakasaka|fakasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fakasath|fakasath]] || [[word:fakasaj|fakasaj]] || [[word:fakasash|fakasash]] || [[word:fakasa|fakasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fakasathal|fakasathal]] || [[word:fakasajal|fakasajal]] || [[word:fakasashal|fakasashal]] || [[word:fakasakal|fakasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fakasathatha|fakasathatha]] || [[word:fakasajaja|fakasajaja]] || [[word:fakasashasha|fakasashasha]] || [[word:fakasaka|fakasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fakasathan|fakasathan]] || [[word:fakasajan|fakasajan]] || [[word:fakasashan|fakasashan]] || [[word:fakasakan|fakasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fakasathaoro|fakasathaoro]] || [[word:fakasajaoro|fakasajaoro]] || [[word:fakasashaoro|fakasashaoro]] || [[word:fakasakaoro|fakasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
